name: SCWorx Corp.
business: SCWorx is a provider of data content and services related to the repair, normalization and interoperability of information for healthcare providers, as well as big data analytics for the healthcare industry. Its software platform enables healthcare providers to simplify, repair, and organize data, and improves information flow between supply chain, clinical systems, and billing functions.
sellsTo: hospitals and health systems in the United States

exposures.sentence: SCWorx is a provider of data content and services related to the repair, normalization and interoperability of information for healthcare providers, as well as big data analytics for the healthcare industry.
